title: 10PCS Hair Styling Combs 10 Piece Professional Hairdressing Hair Stylists Hair Comb Stick Accessories Barbers Coarse Fine Wide Tooth Pin Tail Teasing Styling With Portable Bag Pouch, Plastic, Black
features: A set of 10 hair styling comb, each of unique structure to meet various precisions hair styling or cutting needs. Crafted from durable black plastic in a portable clear roll-up storage pouch is this 10-piece hair styling comb set, with combs of diffferent structure and teeth suitable for various hair types from short to long or straight to curly. This comb set is ideal for purposes at home, salons, barbers & more.
This 10-Piece Hair Styling Comb Set consists of 10 DIFFERENT HAIR COMBS. The combs length varys between 15cm to 22cm.

COMBS FOR VARIOUS PURPOSES - Whether you are interested in just combing your hair, cutting, styling, detangling dyeing or just want to relieve your scalp, this set is designed with combs from fine to wide teeth and tails to meet various hair type needs. Crafted from durable black plastic and some with metal tails so you can now work with hair with precision!

10 DIFFERENT COMBS – This versatile set of hair styling combs includes all the combs you could possibly need. Some designed with single heads and some with double to give you extra support as you comb/style away. Variation of each comb shall meet diverse needs.

TRAVEL FRIENDLY COMB SET – This 10-piece hair comb set comes in clear roll-up & secure closing plastic/vinyl pouch bag with dedicated slots for each comb to give you this compact & organised hair combs set. Compact makes this comb set ideal to pack with you during personal travels or professional purposes i.e. Holidays, Photo Shoots, Bridal Get Ready & more.
